## Overview
sentinel.trust landing page and dashboard for the MCP trust ecosystem.

## Pages
1. **Homepage**: Hero explaining the trust crisis, CTA to verify
2. **Verify Page**: Paste npm package name, get instant trust report
3. **Registry Browser**: Browse verified MCP servers
4. **Server Detail**: Full trust report, certificate history, badge embed
5. **Publisher Dashboard**: Submit certs, track verification status

## Technical Details
- Next.js 14 with App Router
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Shadcn/ui components
- Vercel deployment
- API calls to registry service

## Features
- Trust badge embed code generator
- Real-time verification status
- Historical trust score tracking
- Publisher identity verification
- Search and filter MCP servers

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Landing page with value proposition
- [ ] Interactive verify widget
- [ ] Registry browser with search
- [ ] Server detail pages
- [ ] Publisher dashboard
- [ ] Badge embed code generator
- [ ] Mobile responsive
- [ ] Dark mode support
